First pass at adding video shift First pass at adding video shift 
So I'm struggling a bit to get it working. I stripped it down to what seems like it shouldn't do anything, but video doesn't work when I load the core. I thought maybe I was using the wrong clock, but I tried `clk_48m` as well. I'm going to keep puzzling through it, but if there's something dumb I'm doing, please let me know.
